---
title: "fitSize()"
description: "Fit a size within a maximum width while preserving aspect ratio."
---

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Fit a size within a maximum width while preserving aspect ratio.

## Import

```ts
import { fitSize } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/reactive-layout";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fitSize(
	size: Size,
	maxWidth: number,
): Size
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `size` | `Size` | Input size. |
| `maxWidth` | `number` | Maximum width constraint. |

## Returns

The fitted size.

## Example

```ts
fitSize({ width: 200, height: 100 }, 50);
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/solutions/reactive-layout/utils.ts`
